title: [WSL] Support WSLG in podman machine ssh.
body:
This is a feature request. 
WSLG environment should be automatically configured when entering ssh.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
The request sounds reasonable to me I just haven’t gotten to investigating this one just yet. In the meantime the WSL prompt should work if you need this.
